reviews.comment:
La más hermosa, soy medio fan de las estaciones de servicio en ruta y en pueblos. Esta es chikita, muy completa y bien atendida. Lindo bajarse a comprar algo al shop. 😁😁😁

(Translated by Google)
The prettiest one! I'm a bit of a fan of roadside and small-town gas stations. This one is small, very well-stocked, and has great service. It's nice to stop and buy something at the shop. 😁😁😁
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLOVpXaHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio y atención se puede pagar con app de yp co descuento y tambien por ser socio del ACA con descuento ayuda mucho economicamente

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. You can pay with the YP app with a discount, and being an ACA member also gets a discount, which helps a lot financially.
